plan_under_test: Suspicious rendered-crop dimension findings have deterministic prioritization summaries in the audit report.
tests_added_or_changed: Extend the suspicious dimension regression test to assert summary counts by image kind, reason, paper, and max-height/max-aspect examples.
expected_initial_failure: Before implementation, the extended test should fail because suspicious_rendered_crop_dimension_summary is absent.
what_passing_proves: The audit report gives reviewers deterministic summary evidence for suspicious crop candidates.
Summary data is derived from the same failure evidence used by the gate.
what_passing_does_not_prove: It does not visually inspect the candidates.
It does not reduce the 31 live candidates or repair any crops.
risk_of_bad_tests: Low. The assertions reuse the existing synthetic suspicious-dimension fixture.
